ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PDF export is available on desktop only.
ast.target: PDF 导出仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Electron API unavailable for PDF export.
ast.target: 用于 PDF 导出的 Electron API 不可用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: PDF export is not wired yet. Settings are saved and preview updates are in place.
ast.target: PDF 导出功能尚未连接。设置已保存，预览更新已就绪。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Establish the Hero’s baseline life, limitations, and unmet need.
ast.target: 确立英雄的基准生活、局限性和未满足的需求。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Fear, duty, or doubt causes hesitation; the Hero resists change.
ast.target: 恐惧、责任或疑虑导致犹豫；英雄抗拒改变。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The Hero commits and enters the “special world,” leaving the old life behind.
ast.target: 英雄做出承诺，进入“特殊世界”，告别旧生活。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The rules of the new world are learned; relationships and rivalries form.
ast.target: 学习新世界的规则；形成关系和对抗。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Preparation for the central crisis; tensions tighten and stakes clarify.
ast.target: 为中心危机做准备；紧张局势加剧，利害关系明确。

ast.name: body
ast.source: A major confrontation with death, failure, or the deepest fear.
ast.target: 与死亡、失败或最深恐惧的重大对抗。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The Hero gains something: knowledge, power, object, love, or self-belief.
ast.target: 英雄获得某物：知识、力量、物品、爱情或自信。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Consequences arrive; the Hero must return with the reward under pressure.
ast.target: 后果降临；英雄必须带着奖赏在压力下返回。

ast.name: body
ast.source: A final test proves transformation. The Hero confronts the core flaw one last time.
ast.target: 最终的考验证明了转变。英雄最后一次面对核心缺陷。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The Hero returns changed, bringing value to others: healing, truth, freedom, hope.
ast.target: 英雄带着改变归来，为他人带来价值：治愈、真相、自由、希望。

ast.name: body
ast.source: Establish the character’s normal world and identity.
ast.target: 确立角色的正常世界和身份。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The character wants or needs something that disrupts balance.
ast.target: 角色想要或需要某样打破平衡的东西。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The character leaves comfort and enters a new situation.
ast.target: 角色离开舒适区，进入新情境。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The character explores the new world and tries strategies that may fail.
ast.target: 角色探索新世界，尝试可能失败的策略。

ast.name: body
ast.source: There is a cost: sacrifice, loss, compromise, or consequence.
ast.target: 存在代价：牺牲、损失、妥协或后果。

ast.name: body
ast.source: The character returns to a version of their old world.
ast.target: 角色回到其旧世界的一个版本。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 包含剧集和序列的系列

ast.name: description
ast.target: 散文或短篇非虚构作品

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Techniques that reorganize chronology to control information flow.
ast.target: 通过重组时间顺序来控制信息流的技巧。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Techniques about planting and resolving narrative information. They’re all about audience prediction vs outcome.
ast.target: 关于埋设与揭示叙事信息的技巧。它们都关乎观众的预测与结果。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Techniques that control how conflict is concluded. Think of these as ending logic frameworks.
ast.target: 控制冲突如何收尾的技巧。可将它们视为结局逻辑框架。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: These shape how information is expressed rather than plot structure. These affect reader experience, not plot mechanics.
ast.target: 这些塑造信息的表达方式，而非情节结构。它们影响读者体验，而非情节机制。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Frameworks that model internal transformation and mythic character evolution rather than strict plot beats.
ast.target: 模拟内在转变与神话角色演变的框架，而非严格的情节节拍。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Models that describe how narrative pressure rises and falls across the story.
ast.target: 描述叙事压力在故事中如何起伏的模型。

ast.name: subtitle
ast.source: Architectural choices that shape how perspective, time, or reality are presented.
ast.target: 塑造视角、时间或现实呈现方式的架构选择。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 设置预计总字数（以千为单位）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter author names, separate multiple authors with commas
ast.target: 输入作者姓名，多位作者请用逗号分隔

ast.name: text
ast.target: 多个作者请用逗号分隔

ast.name: text
ast.source: Folio is a project-based writing workspace for long-form projects such as books, screenplays, and series. It keeps drafts, structure, and reference tools together so you can focus on writing instead of managing files.
ast.target: Folio 是一个基于项目的写作工作区，专为书籍、剧本和系列等长篇项目设计。它将草稿、结构和参考工具整合在一起，让您专注于写作而非文件管理。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open Folio from the left ribbon (book icon).
ast.target: 从左侧功能区（书本图标）打开 Folio。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose a project type (Book, Script, Film, TV, etc.).
ast.target: 选择项目类型（书籍、剧本、电影、电视等）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A structured folder and outline are created automatically.
ast.target: 系统会自动创建一个结构化的文件夹和大纲。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Folio View is your project's control center:
ast.target: Folio 视图是您项目的控制中心：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 编辑项目元数据（标题、描述、封面）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open Writer Tools (Focus Mode, Export, Resources).
ast.target: 打开写作工具（专注模式、导出、资源）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Think of this as your project home, not a document.
ast.target: 请将此视作您的项目主页，而非文档。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Projects are organized as a hierarchy:

ast.name: text
ast.target: 章节/场景以树状结构显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This helps you focus on structure and flow, not filenames.
ast.target: 这有助于您专注于结构和流程，而非文件名。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Focus Mode is for drafting sessions:
ast.target: 专注模式用于写作会话：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 写作工具 → 专注模式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use Focus Mode when you want to write, not plan.
ast.target: 当您想写作而非规划时，请使用专注模式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Consolidate your project into a single document or PDF.
ast.target: 将您的项目整合为单个文档或 PDF。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Works for prose and screenplay projects.
ast.target: 适用于散文和剧本项目。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 PDF 设置中自定义布局。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable screenplay formatting by adding this frontmatter to a scene file:
ast.target: 通过在场景文件中添加以下前置元数据来启用剧本格式：

ast.name: text
ast.source: No external plugins required. Works in editing and PDF export.
ast.target: 无需外部插件。在编辑和 PDF 导出中均可使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Projects coexist safely with the rest of your vault.
ast.target: 项目与您的保险库其他内容安全共存。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Keep vault backups. The plugin is provided as-is.
ast.target: 请定期备份保险库。插件按原样提供。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click "New Project" above to create a new project. Click "(?)" above for basic information.
ast.target: 点击上方“新建项目”创建新项目。点击上方“(?)”查看基本信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No project selected. Please select a project first.
ast.target: 未选择项目。请先选择一个项目。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select or create a project before exporting
ast.target: 导出前请先选择或创建一个项目

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open PDF settings to customize layout, cover and font.
ast.target: 打开 PDF 设置以自定义布局、封面和字体。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Hero is the transforming protagonist. They represent the struggle for personal growth, the confrontation of fear, and the overcoming of obstacles. The Hero symbolizes the human drive to transcend limits, improve, and give meaning to adversity.
ast.target: 英雄是经历转变的主人公。他们代表了个人成长的挣扎、对恐惧的直面以及对障碍的克服。英雄象征着人类超越极限、自我提升并赋予逆境意义的驱动力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is a universal archetype found in myth, classical stories, and modern narratives. The Hero’s journey forms the backbone of many plots.
ast.target: 这是一个在神话、古典故事和现代叙事中普遍存在的原型。英雄的旅程构成了许多情节的主干。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Hero is not perfect. They fall, struggle, and rise transformed.
ast.target: 英雄并非完美。他们会跌倒、挣扎，并在蜕变中崛起。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Because it mirrors the human experience: struggle, fall, learning, and transformation.
ast.target: 因为它映射了人类的经验：挣扎、跌倒、学习与蜕变。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Mentor represents inherited knowledge, tradition, and the possibility of inner transformation.
ast.target: 导师代表了传承的知识、传统以及内在转变的可能性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Often the Mentor sacrifices something, forcing the Hero into independence.
ast.target: 通常，导师会牺牲某些东西，迫使英雄走向独立。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Mentor supports the Hero’s growth as:
ast.target: 导师通过以下方式支持英雄的成长：

ast.name: text
ast.source: When the Mentor disappears, the Hero must act alone.
ast.target: 当导师消失时，英雄必须独自行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Shadow can be a villain, antagonist, rival, or internal force.
ast.target: 阴影可以是反派、对手、竞争者或内在力量。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Shadow tests the Hero’s values.
ast.target: 阴影考验英雄的价值观。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Defeating the Shadow often means internal change.
ast.target: 击败阴影往往意味着内在的改变。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Trickster introduces chaos, humor, and unpredictability. They question authority, expose hypocrisy, and disrupt order.
ast.target: 骗术师引入混乱、幽默和不可预测性。他们质疑权威，揭露虚伪，扰乱秩序。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Trickster is rarely evil — they destabilize to reveal truth.
ast.target: 骗术师很少是邪恶的——他们通过制造不稳定来揭示真相。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 他们在矛盾中如鱼得水。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 盟友使英雄更具人性化。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Allies often have their own arcs.
ast.target: 盟友通常也有自己的成长弧线。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 盟友通过以下方式提供帮助：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 他们代表变化与模糊性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Threshold Guardian blocks progress and tests readiness. They appear at key moments of transition.
ast.target: 门槛守卫阻碍进程并考验准备程度。他们出现在关键的过渡时刻。

ast.name: text
ast.source: They are not always villains — they are gatekeepers.
ast.target: 他们不一定是反派——他们是守门人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Caregiver is driven by compassion, responsibility, and the desire to protect others. They exist to nurture, support, and sustain, often putting others’ needs before their own.
ast.target: 照顾者受同情心、责任感和保护他人的愿望驱动。他们存在是为了培育、支持和维系，常常将他人的需求置于自己之上。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This archetype represents altruism, sacrifice, and unconditional care.
ast.target: 这个原型代表了利他主义、牺牲和无条件的关怀。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Caregiver’s weakness is often self-neglect.
ast.target: 照顾者的弱点往往是自我忽视。

ast.name: text
ast.source: They often anchor the story’s heart.
ast.target: 他们常常是故事情感核心的锚点。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Creator is driven by imagination and the urge to build something meaningful. They seek originality, self-expression, and lasting impact through creation.
ast.target: 创造者受想象力和构建有意义事物的冲动驱动。他们通过创造追求原创性、自我表达和持久影响。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This archetype fears mediocrity and unrealized potential.
ast.target: 这个原型恐惧平庸和未实现的潜力。

ast.name: text
ast.source: They are often torn between inspiration and self-doubt.
ast.target: 他们常常在灵感与自我怀疑之间挣扎。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Everyman represents normalcy, relatability, and belonging. They are not exceptional by skill or destiny, but by humanity.
ast.target: 普通人代表常态、亲和力和归属感。他们并非因技能或命运而卓越，而是因人性而非凡。

ast.name: text
ast.source: They succeed through perseverance, not greatness.
ast.target: 他们通过毅力而非伟大取得成功。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This archetype values independence above all else.
ast.target: 这个原型将独立置于一切之上。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Innocent seeks happiness, safety, and goodness. They believe in a just world and trust others easily.
ast.target: 天真者追求幸福、安全和善良。他们相信公正的世界，并轻易信任他人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This archetype represents hope and moral purity.
ast.target: 这个原型代表希望和道德纯洁。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 他们恐惧被抛弃和失去。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Outlaw rejects rules, authority, and conformity. They seek freedom through rebellion and disruption.
ast.target: 叛逆者拒绝规则、权威和从众。他们通过反叛和颠覆来寻求自由。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Ruler seeks order, control, and stability. They value leadership, responsibility, and structure.
ast.target: 统治者追求秩序、控制和稳定。他们重视领导力、责任感和结构。

ast.name: text
ast.source: They fear chaos and loss of power.
ast.target: 他们恐惧混乱和权力丧失。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Sage seeks truth through knowledge and understanding. They value wisdom over action.
ast.target: 智者通过知识和理解寻求真理。他们重视智慧胜于行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is the classic arc of becoming better.
ast.target: 这是变得更好的经典成长弧线。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The character ends the story morally stronger than they began.
ast.target: 角色在故事结束时，在道德上比开始时更强大。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A Moral Descent arc follows a character who deteriorates ethically over time. They begin with good intentions or neutrality but gradually compromise their values, often due to fear, ambition, pride, or trauma.
ast.target: 道德堕落弧线描述了一个随时间推移在伦理上逐渐恶化的角色。他们起初怀有良好意图或保持中立，但逐渐妥协自己的价值观，这通常是由于恐惧、野心、骄傲或创伤所致。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is the arc of corruption.

ast.name: text
ast.source: The character becomes morally worse by the end.
ast.target: 角色在故事结尾时道德上变得更糟。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The arc is external rather than internal.
ast.target: 此弧线是外在的，而非内在的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A Moral Transformation arc depicts a character who undergoes a fundamental ethical shift. Unlike gradual ascent or descent, this change is often abrupt, intense, and tied to a defining moment or revelation.
ast.target: 道德转变弧线描绘了一个经历根本性伦理转变的角色。与渐进的上升或堕落不同，这种转变往往是突然的、强烈的，并与一个决定性时刻或启示相关联。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The character becomes morally different — not just better or worse.
ast.target: 角色变得道德上不同——不仅仅是更好或更坏。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you find it useful, you can optionally support its development here
ast.target: 如果您觉得它有用，可以在此处选择性地支持其开发

ast.name: text
ast.source: Support is voluntary and does not unlock features or provide special access.
ast.target: 支持是自愿的，不会解锁功能或提供特殊访问权限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Follow for updates and writing resources:
ast.target: 关注以获取更新和写作资源：

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Number of 25-minute focus sessions completed without exiting
ast.target: 在未退出的情况下完成的 25 分钟专注会话次数

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Number of times you paused during an active focus session
ast.target: 在活跃的专注会话中暂停的次数

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Words written during the current focus session
ast.target: 当前专注会话期间撰写的字数

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Target number of words to write per session
ast.target: 每次会话的目标撰写字数
